animation.init: Initialization: Calculate the In-degree for all nodes.
animation.enqueue_zero: Enqueue all nodes with an In-degree of 0 into the Queue.
animation.while_loop: Queue is not empty, preparing to pop the next node.
animation.add_to_result: Append node [{{curr}}] into the final Result topological sequence.
animation.reduce_neighbor: Remove edge {{curr}} → {{neighbor}}. Decrementing the target node's in-degree by 1.
animation.check_zero_true: Node [{{neighbor}}]'s in-degree reached 0! Dependencies resolved, enqueuing.
animation.check_zero_false: Node [{{neighbor}}]'s in-degree reduced to {{deg}}, other dependencies remain.
animation.cycle_check_start: Queue is empty, main loop terminated. Checking if sorted count equals total node count.
animation.cycle_detected: Error detected: Sorted nodes ({{resLen}}) < Total nodes ({{nodeLen}})! A 'Cycle' exists in the graph.
animation.cycle_deadlock: Remaining red nodes are locked in circular dependencies (In-degree cannot reach 0), causing a Deadlock. Topological sort failed.
animation.success_verify: Verification success: Sorted nodes ({{resLen}}) == Total nodes ({{nodeLen}}). Valid Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG).

ui.loadTooltip: Open custom Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) loader interface
ui.resetTooltip: Clear all data and restore to default graph
ui.randomTooltip: Generate a random Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG)
